meta.title: Behind The Scenes Photoshop - Great Wall of China
meta.description:
I've been to the Great Wall of China in my space suit... I can tell you first hand, it's not big enough to see from space! I'm not sure what exactly is behind this picture other than I think it looks really cool :)

Catch photoshop live streams on twitch every Thursday at 2:00 central (20 UTC) at http://twitch.tv/everydayastronaut

See the final image by following me on Instagram @EverydayAstronaut - http://instagram.com/everydayastronaut
